creator: moonshade@pnhz.kz
text:
The panic was introduced by the patch for CVE-2007-4572: https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=5087

Log have something like "PANIC (pid xxxx): push_ascii - dest_len == -1".

Fix: 

The patch to 3.0.26a is on https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=5087. It is said to be fixed in 3.0.27a.
How-To-Repeat: 1. mount -t smbfs //username@hostname/share /mountpoint
2. ls /mountpoint
